import pandas as pd
import numpy as np


def load_sales_data(path: str) -> pd.DataFrame:
    df = pd.read_csv(path, dtype={"amount": np.float64, "quantity": np.int64, "price": np.float64})
    return df


def process_numeric(df: pd.DataFrame) -> pd.DataFrame:
    df["total"] = df["amount"] * df["quantity"]
    df["tax"] = df["price"] * 0.08
    return df
